title: Paid-plan retriever endpoint for external AI agents
reason: SaaS launches free-only: knowledge saving, the Claude Code /explain connection, and all web UI features are free; the retriever endpoint for AI-agent consumption is the designated paid feature and no paid plan exists yet
trigger: operator decides to introduce the paid plan
dropped_reason: Superseded by P15 (Agent-facing retrieval MCP service). P15 builds the external-agent retriever surface D6 anticipated — an MCP search/fetch_document service over Streamable-HTTP, vk_-scoped per project, dual-reachable (internal service-name + public edge). The retriever interface now exists. D6's remaining aspect — actually charging for it (a paid plan / gating the MCP surface) — is a separate business + billing decision P15 does not build; the P11 usage-event metering is the substrate for it when the operator introduces a paid plan. That monetization step is re-captured as a new, narrower deferred job.
